sidebar.title: Recent
sidebar.locked_hint: Knowledge pack is building. You can close this page; it keeps going.

hero.title: Your hardware repair assistant.
hero.sub: Give me your device and the symptom: I'll build the knowledge and open the diagnostic.
hero.device_placeholder: Device (e.g. MNT Reform motherboard, iPhone 11, Framework 13)
hero.symptom_placeholder: Symptom (e.g. won't power on, no charge, black screen)

preflight.title: Start the diagnostic · {device}
preflight.intro: No knowledge sheet exists for this device yet. Launching builds one from scratch.
preflight.credit: This diagnostic uses 1 credit to build the device knowledge pack.
preflight.time: Building the full pack can take more than 15 minutes. You can close this page; it keeps building.
preflight.schematic_label: Schematic: now is the moment to add it
preflight.schematic_none: No schematic provided. If you have the schematic PDF, add it now. It sharply improves the pack.
preflight.schematic_attached: Schematic attached. It will be ingested to sharpen the pack.
preflight.email_optin: Email me when the device is ready, so I don't have to wait here.

status.queued: Waiting: position {position} in the queue ({ahead} ahead). The diagnostic starts automatically as soon as a slot frees up.
status.checking: Saving your repair and checking whether I already know this device…
status.rule_match: I already know this case ({rule_id}). Opening the diagnostic…
status.device_known: I already know {device}. Opening the diagnostic…
status.expand: I know {device}. Adding your specific symptom (~3 min).
status.build_new: New to me: building the sheet in the background. Feel free to watch.
status.build_delay: New device: preparing its knowledge sheet. This can take a while. You can close this page and come back, it keeps building.
status.notify_armed: Done. We'll email you as soon as the device is ready.
status.ws_lost: Pipeline connection lost. Reload the page if nothing moves.
status.validation_device: Be more specific about the device (at least a few words).
status.validation_symptom: Describe the symptom a bit more.

delete.confirm: Delete this repair? The conversation and the agent's notes will be permanently erased.

knowledge.title: Add knowledge about the device
knowledge.intro: More context builds a sharper pack. Everything here is optional.

board_number.label: Board number (optional)
board_number.hint: Engraved on the PCB. Unlocks the known specifics of your exact revision.

schematic.already_ingested: Schematic already ingested ✓ (no need to attach)

free.locked_hint: Free plan: pick an already-analyzed device (✓) from the list to start a diagnostic.
free.upgrade_cta: Upgrade to Pro to analyze a new device →

catalogue.title: Available devices
catalogue.search_placeholder: Search a device, brand, board number…
catalogue.fiche_symptom_placeholder: Describe the problem (e.g. won't power on, no charge)
catalogue.fiche_draft_locked: This device is still being built — diagnostic unavailable yet.
